SEARCH
Package org.Buffer

Class CharacterCell

java.lang.Object
org.Buffer.CharacterCell
public class CharacterCell extends Object
Class to represent a single character cell within the terminal. Consists of: a Character representing the character in the cell a Colour representing the foreground colour of the cell a Colour representing the background colour of the cell a Style representing the style flag of the cell

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CharacterCell(Character c)
    Constructor for a non-wide CharacterCell where all other attributes are set to default values, i.e.
    CharacterCell(Character c, Colour fc, Colour bc, boolean[] sf)
    Constructor for a CharacterCell where the trailer flag is automatically set to false.

    Constructor for a CharacterCell
    CharacterCell(Character c, TrailFlag tf)
    Constructor for a wide CharacterCell where all other attributes are set to default values, i.e.

  • Constructor Details

    • CharacterCell

      public CharacterCell(Character c, Colour fc, Colour bc, boolean[] sf, TrailFlag tf)
      Constructor for a CharacterCell
      Parameters:
      c - the character to be stored in this cell
      fc - the foreground colour of the cell
      bc - the background colour of the cell
      sf - the style flag of the cell
      tf - the type of this character (1 space, 2 space start, 2 space end)

    • CharacterCell

      public CharacterCell(Character c, Colour fc, Colour bc, boolean[] sf)
      Constructor for a CharacterCell where the trailer flag is automatically set to false. Should be the default constructor for non-wide characters
      Parameters:
      c - the character to be stored in this cell
      fc - the foreground colour of the cell
      bc - the background colour of the cell
      sf - the style flag of the cell

    • CharacterCell

      public CharacterCell(Character c)
      Constructor for a non-wide CharacterCell where all other attributes are set to default values, i.e. DEFAULT, DEFAULT and NONE
      Parameters:
      c - the character this CharacterCell should contain

    • CharacterCell

      public CharacterCell(Character c, TrailFlag tf)
      Constructor for a wide CharacterCell where all other attributes are set to default values, i.e. DEFAULT, DEFAULT and NONE
      Parameters:
      c - the character this CharacterCell should contain
      tf - the type of this character (1 space, 2 space start, 2 space end)

  • Method Details

    • getCharacter

      public Character getCharacter()
      Returns:
      the character stored in this CharacterCell

      public void setCharacter(Character val)
      Parameters:
      val - the value to set this CharacterCell's character to

      Returns:
      the foreground colour stored in this CharacterCell

      public Colour getBackgroundColour()
      Returns:
      the background colour stored in this CharacterCell

    • setBackgroundColour

      public void setBackgroundColour(Colour val)
      Parameters:
      val - the value to set this CharacterCell's background colour to

    • getStyleFlag

      public boolean getStyleFlag(Style flag)
      Parameters:
      flag - the style flag whose status you want to know
      Returns:
      the status of the given flag in this CharacterCell

    • setStyleFlag

      public void setStyleFlag(Style flag, boolean val)
      Sets the provided style flag for this char to the given value
      Parameters:
      flag - the style flag to set
      val - the value to set this Style to

    • getTrailFlag

      public TrailFlag getTrailFlag()
      Returns:
      the trial flag stored in this CharacterCell

      public void setTrailFlag(TrailFlag val)
      Parameters:
      val - the value to set this CharacterCell's trail flag to

    • getAllStyleFlags

      public boolean[] getAllStyleFlags()
      Returns:
      the state of all the style flags stored in this CharacterCell

    • setAllStyleFlags

      public void setAllStyleFlags(boolean[] vals)
      Parameters:
      vals - the value to set this CharacterCell's style flags to

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Checks if two CharacterCells are equal by checking for equality between all constituent variables
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the other Object to check against
      Returns:
      true if all internal are the same, false if not or if the provided object is null or of a different class

    • copy

      public void copy(CharacterCell c)
      Copies all of the internal variables of a different CharacterCell into the caller
      Parameters:
